summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CrickPredict PWA Stages 7-14. All major features working: Login, Home page with countdown/refresh, Match Detail, Contest Join, Predictions (11 questions), Leaderboard with User Answer Modal, My Contests with filters, Admin Panel (Dashboard/Matches/Resolve). Fixed 2 minor bugs during testing.
passed_tests: Login flow: Get Started -> Phone (9876543210) -> Continue -> Login link -> PIN (1234) -> Home page
Home page: User greeting 'Hey, TestPlayer_4360!' with balance (10,900 coins)
Home page: Refresh button works and spins while refreshing
Home page: Live countdown timers on match cards (1d 2h, 1d 5h, etc.)
Home page: Live Now section with LIVE badge on Test Tournament match
Home page: Upcoming Matches section with 6 matches
Home page: Hot Contests section with 3 open contests
Match Detail: Click match -> team hero card (MI vs CSK) with team logos
Match Detail: Shows 4 contests with Join/Predict/Results buttons based on status
Match Detail: Join button (1), Predict buttons (2), Results button (1)
Join Contest: Click Join -> API call succeeds -> navigates to Prediction page
Prediction page: 11 question dots displayed with navigation
Prediction page: Question card with Hindi + English text, category badge, points
Prediction page: 4 color-coded options (A/B/C/D) with Hindi + English text
Prediction page: Previous/Next navigation works, answer count updates
Prediction page: View Leaderboard (Rank) button works
Leaderboard page: Trophy header, contest name, player count (1 Players), prize pool (1,000)
Leaderboard page: 'Your Position' section shows rank #1 with 25 pts
Leaderboard page: Rank list with gold styling for #1, username, team name, points, prize won (+500)
User Answer Modal: Click user on leaderboard -> bottom sheet opens
User Answer Modal: Shows username, team name, rank title, total points, rank #1
User Answer Modal: Shows 3 Predictions with 2 Correct, 1 Wrong, +500 coins
User Answer Modal: Each prediction shows Q#, question text, selected option with correct/wrong indicator
User Answer Modal: Close button (X) works
My Contests page: Shows 3 joined contests (Mini Contest, Free Contest, Free Prediction Contest)
My Contests page: Filter tabs (All/Open/Live/Completed) work correctly
My Contests page: Shows team badges (MI vs CSK), points, rank, prediction stats
My Contests page: Completed contest shows 'Rank #1 | +500' and '2/3' correct indicator
Bottom Nav: All 4 tabs (Home, My Contest, Wallet, Profile) work correctly
Wallet page: Shows balance (10,900), daily reward, transaction history
Profile page: Shows username, rank (Rookie), phone, stats (1 Matches, 1 Won, 0 Points)
Profile page: Referral code (8I9EPH) with copy button
Profile page: Admin Panel button visible
Admin Dashboard: Shows stats cards (Total Matches=7, Live=1, Upcoming=6, Total Contests=4, Open=3, Completed=1)
Admin Matches: Lists all 7 matches with status badges (LIVE, UPCOMING)
Admin Matches: Sync from Cricbuzz button works (shows 'No matches from Cricbuzz' - expected in container)
Admin Matches: Expand match to see status change buttons (upcoming/live/completed/abandoned)
Admin Resolve: Lists 3 open contests (Mega, Mini, Free) with Resolve buttons
Admin Resolve: Shows 1 completed contest (Free Prediction Contest) with checkmark
Admin Resolve: Click Resolve -> shows 11 questions with answer options (A/B/C/D)
Admin Resolve: Questions show Hindi text with answer buttons
Admin Resolve: Finalize & Distribute Prizes button visible at bottom
Admin Resolve: Back to Contests link works
Back navigation: All sub-pages have working back buttons
Cricbuzz API: /api/matches/live/cricbuzz returns connected:false (expected - container network restriction)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user and seeded data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stages 7-14 fully tested and working. All features operational: Contest Join, Predictions (11 questions), Leaderboard with User Answer Modal, Admin Panel (Dashboard/Matches/Resolve). Fixed 2 minor bugs: 1) Cricbuzz sync message showing 'undefined' when no matches, 2) Admin Resolve not navigating to detail view (fixed by setting selectedContest after API success). User has 10,900 coins. Cricbuzz integration returns connected:false in container environment (expected).

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Cricbuzz sync showing 'Synced: undefined new, undefined updated' when no matches returned
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added check for res.data.message and fallback to 0 for created/updated counts

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Admin Resolve not navigating to question detail view when clicking Resolve button
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed loadQuestions to set selectedContest only after API call succeeds, added loading message

mocked_apis.Cricbuzz: Returns connected:false with 0 matches due to container network restrictions. This is expected behavior.
